subject: enron on-line - hpl interruptible transport gtc

emails.subject: Enron On-line - HPL Interruptible Transport GTC
emails.subject_base: Enron On-line - HPL Interruptible Transport GTC
emails.body: Enron On-line HPL Interruptible Transport GTC Ed Lauri, Attached is a very rough draft of the GTC for HPL's Interruptible Intrastate Transportation service transacted via Enron On-Line. Gerald is out of the office this week (Cabo San Lucas, no less) but we wanted to get a rough draft to you so you could see the format and structure of the GTC. We'd like to sit down sometime next week with the two of you and David Forester to flush out the process some more. For several provisions we'll need to determine exactly how the transaction will take place on Enron On-line before we can appropriately draft such provisions and determine what terminology to use. Note: The 311 GTC is exactly the same as the Intrastate except of course for section 2 Regulation. Thanks, Eric Gillaspie 713-345-7667 Enron Building 3886

emails.subject_base: Enron On-line - HPL Interruptible Transport GTC
emails.body: Re: Enron On-line HPL Interruptible Transport GTC Eric/Gerald We need to get together on Monday if possible to talk about this contract and the descriptions of the points, etc. EDG
